translations.en: We're leaving now, my little wolf.
translations.de: Wir gehen jetzt, mein kleiner Wolf.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们现在走吧，我的小狼。
translations.yue: 我哋而家走啦，我隻小狼仔。
translations.he: אנחנו יוצאים עכשיו, הזאב הקטן שלי.
translations.vi: Chúng ta đi ngay bây giờ nhé, sói con của mẹ.
translations.nl: We gaan nu, mijn kleine wolf.
translations.hi: हम अभी निकल रहे हैं, मेरे छोटे भेड़िये.
translations.nb: Vi drar nå, lille ulven min.
translations.sv: Vi går nu, min lilla varg.
translations.da: Vi går nu, min lille ulv.
translations.ja: もう行くよ、ぼくの小さなオオカミ。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (impersonal/colloquial ‘we’); triggers 3rd person singular agreement.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with ‘On’.
Temporal adverb specifying when the action occurs.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, masculine singular; modifies ‘loup’ (vocative).
Common noun, masculine singular; here used as a term of address (vocative).

sentences.target: On regarde un documentaire sur le loup.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʁə.ɡaʁd œ̃ dɔ.kʏ.mɑ̃.tɛʁ syʁ lə lu/

translations.fr: On regarde un documentaire sur le loup.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʁə.ɡaʁd œ̃ dɔ.kʏ.mɑ̃.tɛʁ syʁ lə lu/
translations.en: We're watching a documentary about the wolf.
translations.es: Estamos viendo un documental sobre el lobo.
translations.de: Wir schauen eine Dokumentation über den Wolf.
translations.it: Stiamo guardando un documentario sul lupo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在看一部关于狼的纪录片。
translations.yue: 我哋喺睇一套關於狼嘅紀錄片。
translations.ru: Мы смотрим документальный фильм о волке.
translations.pt: Estamos vendo um documentário sobre o lobo.
translations.he: אנחנו צופים בסרט תיעודי על הזאב.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang xem một bộ phim tài liệu về loài sói.
translations.ar: نحن نشاهد فيلمًا وثائقيًا عن الذئب.
translations.nl: We kijken naar een documentaire over de wolf.
translations.uk: Ми дивимося документальний фільм про вовка.
translations.hi: हम भेड़िये पर एक वृत्तचित्र देख रहे हैं.
translations.el: Βλέπουμε ένα ντοκιμαντέρ για τον λύκο.
translations.nb: Vi ser på en dokumentar om ulven.
translations.id: Kami menonton film dokumenter tentang serigala.
translations.sv: Vi tittar på en dokumentär om vargen.
translations.cs: Díváme se na dokument o vlkovi.
translations.da: Vi ser en dokumentar om ulven.
translations.ja: オオカミについてのドキュメンタリーを見ているよ。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; triggers 3rd person singular agreement.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determines ‘documentaire’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘regarde’.
Preposition introducing a prepositional phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines ‘loup’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of ‘sur’ (generic species reference).

sentences.target: Je dessine un loup pour l'école.

translations.fr: Je dessine un loup pour l'école.
translations.en: I'm drawing a wolf for school.
translations.es: Estoy dibujando un lobo para la escuela.
translations.de: Ich zeichne einen Wolf für die Schule.
translations.it: Sto disegnando un lupo per la scuola.
translations.pt: Estou desenhando um lobo para a escola.
translations.vi: Mình đang vẽ một con sói cho trường.
translations.nl: Ik teken een wolf voor school.
translations.hi: मैं स्कूल के लिए एक भेड़िया बना रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Ζωγραφίζω έναν λύκο για το σχολείο.
translations.nb: Jeg tegner en ulv til skolen.
translations.id: Saya menggambar seekor serigala untuk sekolah.
translations.sv: Jag ritar en varg till skolan.
translations.da: Jeg tegner en ulv til skolen.
translations.ja: 学校の宿題でオオカミを描いているよ。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Present indicative, 1st person singular; main predicate.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determines ‘loup’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘dessine’.
Preposition introducing a purpose/beneficiary complement.
Definite article elided before vowel-initial noun; feminine here with ‘école’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘pour’.

sentences.target: On a entendu un loup cette nuit.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ a ɑ̃.tɑ̃.dy œ̃ lu sɛt nɥi/

translations.fr: On a entendu un loup cette nuit.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ a ɑ̃.tɑ̃.dy œ̃ lu sɛt nɥi/
translations.en: We heard a wolf last night.
translations.de: Wir haben letzte Nacht einen Wolf gehört.
translations.it: Ieri notte abbiamo sentito un lupo.
translations.yue: 我哋尋晚聽到咗狼嘅叫聲。
translations.pt: Ontem à noite ouvimos um lobo.
translations.tr: Dün gece bir kurdun sesini duyduk.
translations.vi: Đêm qua chúng tôi nghe thấy một con sói.
translations.nl: Afgelopen nacht hoorden we een wolf.
translations.hi: कल रात हमने एक भेड़िये की आवाज़ सुनी.
translations.el: Ακούσαμε έναν λύκο χθες το βράδυ.
translations.nb: I går natt hørte vi en ulv.
translations.id: Tadi malam kami mendengar seekor serigala.
translations.sv: I natt hörde vi en varg.
translations.ro: Noaptea trecută am auzit un lup.
translations.cs: Včera v noci jsme slyšeli vlka.
translations.da: I nat hørte vi en ulv.
translations.ja: 昨夜オオカミの鳴き声を聞いたよ。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; triggers 3rd person singular agreement.
Auxiliary ‘avoir’, present 3rd person singular; forms passé composé.
Past participle; main lexical verb in compound tense (no agreement here as DO follows).
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determines ‘loup’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘a entendu’.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; determines ‘nuit’.
Common noun, feminine singular; temporal complement.
